answer: Completed. YoY ARR growth net of churn over the last 8 quarters: AMER +14.2%, EMEA +9.6%, APAC +21.3%. By segment, Enterprise grew +11.8% while Mid-Market led at +18.4%; SMB was roughly flat at +1.2%, dragged by higher churn. Full per-quarter, per-region, per-segment series is in the citations' source rollup.

citations.snippet: SUM(arr) by fiscal_quarter x region x segment for trailing 8 quarters, net of churned-account ARR.
Segment and region dimensions reconciled against the CRM account dimension at quarter close.

routing_decision.rationale: Poll of an in-flight compile; the original warehouse fan-out completed and the cached draft was finalized — no re-classification or new routing.
